message:
feat(demo): add PerformanceHud screen and snapshot player test coverage

New PerformanceHud screen (bd-3k3x):
- Adds a render budget visualizer and performance HUD to the demo
  showcase, displaying frame timing, budget utilization, and runtime
  metrics in a dedicated screen
- Registers as the 27th demo screen with Tab/Shift+Tab navigation
- Implements update/view/tick lifecycle for live metrics

Snapshot player:
- Minor formatting fix in snapshot_player.rs
- Add snapshot_player_ux_a11y.rs with comprehensive accessibility
  tests covering keyboard navigation, diagnostics panel, vim-style
  bindings, and marker functionality

Mouse playground:
- Fix test assertion in mouse_playground_ux_a11y.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
